name: Cleared
description: Indicates whether the transaction has been cleared (‘Y’), not cleared (‘N”) or that the reporting entity intends it to be cleared by a CCP (‘I’).
optionalityRules: Required for Action types NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI.
Not reported for Action types TERM, EROR, PRTO.
valueRules: The value is one of Y, N or I.
